name: t-0
description: T-0 — browser terminal + agent launcher (real local PTY in a tab)

scripts.terminal:vendor:build: bun build terminal/vendor.ts --outdir terminal/dist --target browser --minify --entry-naming vendor.[ext]
scripts.terminal:html: bun run terminal:vendor:build && bun run terminal/server.ts
scripts.terminal:install: bun run terminal:vendor:build && bun run terminal:launcher:install && ./terminal/install-launch-agent.sh
scripts.check:data-dir: node --input-type=module -e "import { modernDataDir, dataDir } from './terminal/data-dir.mjs'; if (!modernDataDir().endsWith('.t-0')) process.exit(1); dataDir(); console.log('data-dir ok')"
scripts.check:rust: rustup run stable cargo check --locked --manifest-path terminal/launcher-ratatui/Cargo.toml
scripts.check: bun run terminal:vendor:build && bun run typecheck && bun run check:shell && bun run check:data-dir && bun run check:rust && bun run www:build
